description: One typed FACTUAL fiscal flow edge in the kanae fund-flow graph, assembled by kanae_flow_assembler (domestic chain) or kanae_intergov_flow (inter-governmental). R0 skeleton per ADR-2605302300 §3/§4; ref-typed nesting added (R1 hardening = additionalProperties:false + required-field enforcement). CONSTITUTIONAL: this record describes a FACTUAL fund movement only — it MUST NOT assert that a crime / 不正 / violation occurred (G4 UPL-equivalent). The `flowClass` enum is DESCRIPTIVE and carries NO crime/violation/guilt value (a legal verdict is unrepresentable at the schema layer). `sourceRecordCids` MUST contain ≥2 upstream gov.dataset.* / danjo record CIDs (G5). Persisted in kotoba EAVT (G2; NO RisingWave / Postgres / Lance). `stateAlignedFlag` passes through from source (G13). Named endpoints (G10) are structured via #endpointRef: an endpoint may be a named party ONLY by citing the public source record that already names it.

sourceCellDid.description: DID of the kanae cell that assembled the edge (kanae_flow_assembler / kanae_intergov_flow)

flowClass.description: DESCRIPTIVE fiscal-flow category ONLY. No crime/violation/guilt value exists (G4).

fromEndpoint.description: Source side: a fiscal authority / appropriation line / donor jurisdiction

toEndpoint.description: Target side: a recipient entity (LEI) / program / recipient jurisdiction

amount.description: Decimal string (avoids float drift). The reported magnitude; NOT an audited figure.

normalizedAmountUsd.description: Optional decimal string normalized to USD at a disclosed period rate (for cross-jurisdiction visualization); the rate basis is recorded in the methodNote

jurisdiction.description: ISO-3 (domestic) OR supra (EU / OECD / UN / WB / IMF) for the edge's reporting context

sourceRecordCids.description: ≥2 upstream gov.dataset.* / danjo record CIDs that ground this edge (G5)

methodNoteCid.description: kanae.methodNote record CID defining the open, versioned assembly heuristic (G6)

stateAlignedFlag.description: Pass-through from source (G13); CN-class / state-aligned figures are NOT treated as independently verified

endpointRef.description: A fund-flow endpoint. An endpoint is a named party ONLY where the public source record already names it (G10). Aggregate endpoints (recipient class, program total, jurisdiction) are the R0/R1 default.

publiclyNamedBasis.description: REQUIRED when this endpoint names a specific party: the source record CID that already names them publicly (G10). Absent for aggregate endpoints.
